queue_item.action: Fail closed when retained exact-SHA workflow-run pages do not prove row, count, and terminal-page integrity.

progress.finding: Exact-SHA pagination evidence is promotable only when retained pages are contiguous, total_count is stable, every row matches the requested head_sha, run ids are unique, one terminal page exists, and retained count reconciles below the 1000-result filtered-search cap.
progress.verification: GitHub accepted immutable source, test, and evidence writes; six tests are committed but were not executed in this run.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should apply this classifier after exact-SHA page aggregation and before promoting workflow-run absence or completeness into deployment evidence. Preserve raw Link headers and total_count for every page.
